en: I don't need a piece of wine.
ja: ワインなんていらない

en: They come running just as fast as they can.
ja: みんな全速力で走ってくる
vi: Ho chay den nhanh het muc co the

en: From every girl crazy about as sharp as me.
ja: 僕みたいにかっこいい男に夢中の女の子たちが
zhTW: 每個為像我一樣帥的人瘋狂的女孩
vi: Tu moi co gai me man anh chang nhu toi
